candidate_llm_application: TAONGA-MICRO-BAND: non-uniform pitch-quantization codec for speech LLMs; default-speech band uses 100-cent semitone bins, prosody-emotional-locus band uses dense 25-50 cent micro-bins (4-5x density), high-frequency tail coarser bins
rule: hit iff kw_count>=2 OR sem_score>=0.7 OR func_score>=0.7; total_hits>=1 => FAIL

results.title: Spark-TTS 2503.01710 attribute tokenizer fine-grained BiCodec
results.rationale: Spark-TTS attribute tokenizer delivers fine-grained pitch quantization via BiCodec — directly overlaps the fine-pitch-token core of TAONGA-MICRO-BAND though without explicit non-uniform across-frequency allocation.

results.title: SAC 2510.16841 dual-stream semantic-acoustic codec
results.rationale: Dual-stream codec separately quantizing semantic vs fine-grained acoustic equates to allocating different resolution to different sub-spaces — same non-uniform-allocation principle.

results.title: VoxCPM 2509.24650 residual acoustic LM
results.rationale: Residual acoustic LM that preserves subtle vocal characteristics is the same effect targeted by TAONGA-MICRO-BAND emotional-locus dense bins.

results.title: CosyVoice 2 FSQ finer-grained pitch/emotion control
results.rationale: FSQ replacement of VQ explicitly for finer-grained pitch/emotion control is a near functional twin of the dense-micro-bin emotional-region mechanism.

results.title: STCTS 2512.00451 non-uniform prosody-delta Huffman coding
results.rationale: EXACT TWIN — explicitly non-uniform bin allocation by prosody distribution density; this IS the same mechanism (non-uniform-quantization-by-distribution-density) as TAONGA-MICRO-BAND.

results.title: Emotional TTS 2510.01722 emotion-timbre disentanglement
results.rationale: Per-phoneme style encoder dedicates capacity to emotion-prosody — same idea of concentrating modeling capacity on expressive sub-space.

results.title: NaturalSpeech 3 FACodec factorized VQ prosody/acoustic/timbre
results.rationale: Factorized VQ partitioning capacity across content/prosody/acoustic/timbre subspaces is the same non-uniform-allocation-across-axis principle.

results.title: Unsupervised Prosody Quantization 2204.03238
results.rationale: Dedicated unsupervised prosody codebook for controllable synthesis is the prosody-locus dense quantization paradigm.

reason: All 8 search results trigger hit under sem>=0.7 AND func>=0.7. STCTS 2512.00451 is an exact functional twin: non-uniform bin allocation by prosody distribution density — identical to TAONGA-MICRO-BAND's non-uniform-quantization-by-emotional-locus-density. CosyVoice 2 FSQ, Spark-TTS BiCodec, NaturalSpeech 3 FACodec, and SAC dual-stream already cover fine-grained / factorized / non-uniform-across-subspace quantization for prosody and emotion in speech LLM codecs. The Maori-taonga-puoro analogy adds cultural framing but no novel computational mechanism beyond standard non-uniform-quantization-by-density (mu-law-like) already deployed in STCTS for the same target. total_hits=8 >= 1, candidate FAILS the threshold.
recommendation: REJECT candidate. The proposed non-uniform pitch-codebook-allocation by emotional-prosody locus is fully anticipated by STCTS (non-uniform prosody Huffman) + CosyVoice 2 (FSQ for emotion control) + NaturalSpeech 3 FACodec (factorized VQ across prosody/acoustic subspaces). To salvage, candidate would need a distinctive mechanism such as (a) breath-pressure-conditioned dynamic re-binning, (b) instrument-microtone-mode finger-pressure-gated quantizer with explicit non-Western interval embedding, or (c) culturally-adaptive runtime codebook switch — not merely density reallocation, which is already standard.
